mapper.select: SELECT follower_id, followee_id, created_at FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT follower_id, followee_id, created_at FROM follows WHERE followee_id = #{followeeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (follower_id, followee_id, created_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT f1.* FROM follows f1 INNER JOIN follows f2 ON f1.follower_id = f2.followee_id AND f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
